sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.4: Fix updater to use the installed plugin folder name dynamically.
  • 1.8.3: Add guest contact fields to Add Booking form.
  • 1.8.2: Fix built-in updater package install/folder move handling.
